subcodes.first_line: The letter of your eminence reached this servant, and after being presented, these words flowed forth from the tongue (...) [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مکتوب آنجناب باین عبد واصل بعد از معروض داشتن باین کلمات دریات لسان (...)
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @interpretation of dreams and visions, @symbolism, @growth of the Cause, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
